who: HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month
offer: For HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month, manual tracking causes payroll errors. We streamline time off requests and payroll adjustments instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Managing employee time off requests and payroll adjustments manually is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators seeking solutions
Share insights on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to HR administrators with a demo video
Engage in community forums where HR administrators discuss tools
try_it: Let users try the time off request submission form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for requests
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
